2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability, limited to one change per booking, and the new session must take place within 14 days of the original booking date. 

To reschedule, please contact us via WhatsApp at +60 12-396 8828.

Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.

2. Our standard booking window is 14 days. For those who like to plan ahead, we offer early access bookings beyond this window for an additional RM10 per court. To lock in your preferred time in advance, please contact us via Whatsapp at +60 12-396 8828.

"tags": ["clc8tlc5bbt2p6ogmj1xm2h3a"]}], "announcement": "", "announcementCreated": "2026-05-18T00:07:31.150Z", "centrePolicy": "PICKLE FIRST CLUB – BOOKING POLICIES

Cancellation Policy
-By proceeding with the booking, you agree to our cancellation policy. Any cancellation made less than 24 hours before the scheduled booking time will be considered a late cancellation and no refund will be provided.
⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻
Rain Policy
Pickle First Club operates both covered and outdoor courts. In the event of rain:

* If covered courts are available, your booking may be moved to a covered court where possible.
* If all covered courts are fully booked and rain occurs within the first 45 minutes of your session, a refund will be provided in the form of club credits.
* If rain occurs after the first 45 minutes of the booking session, no refund or credit will be provided.

Management reserves the right to make final decisions regarding rain-related situations.
⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻
Coaching Policy
-All coaching or training sessions conducted at Pickle First Club must be carried out only by coaches approved or arranged by Pickle First Club.

-External or private coaching by non-approved coaches is strictly prohibited. Any unauthorized coaching activities may result in booking cancellation without refund and possible restriction from future bookings.
⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻
General Policy

* Players are responsible for their own belongings and personal safety while using the facilities.
* Pickle First Club reserves the right to amend policies and court arrangements when necessary.
* By making a booking, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to all policies stated above."}

1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.
 
Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
2. Each session is 55 minutes playing time + 5 minutes packing time.
3. Please input the mobile number with WhatsApp.
4. Confirmation and Access Code will be send via WhatsApp.
 
Terms and conditions:
 
1. All user and participant should wear appropriate clothing and sports shoes. Bare foot and body is not allowed.
2. No smoking or food is allowed.
3. No sticky materials can be used inside the court (e.g. Tape)
4. Do not use fire, water, paint, food, powder and solvent in the court.
5. Do not change the electronic and audio settings in the hall.
6. If any equipment, instrument or other property is damaged (except for normal wear and tear), stolen or removed, user is required to pay for the charge of maintenance, repairing or re-purchasing.
7. All user and participant should take their own risk for any injured or accident for the sport activities, MyPickleCourt will accept no responsibility for any personal injured or accident.
8. All user and participant should not leave valuables in the court. MyPickleCourt will accept no responsibility for loss of personal property.
9. Animals are not allowed to be brought into the court.
10. After the end of reserved time, all users and participants must leave the court and return all equipment immediately.", "socialMediaLinks": {"facebook": 1. Court bookings can be made up to two weeks in advance.
2. Court bookings open at 12:00:01am each day. 
3. Each court booking can be rescheduled once with at least 48 hours' notice, subject to availability. To reschedule, WhatsApp +6016 508 0492 with your booking reference and preferred date/time.
4. Rain-interrupted sessions can be rescheduled to a time within one month from the original booking date, subject to availability.
5. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests must be made within 48 hours of the original booking. 
6. For reschedules from non-peak to peak hours, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours. 
7. No-shows are forfeited without refunds. 
8. Refunds for bookings paid are not allowed. 

Others: 
1. For safety and injury avoidance, please wear appropriate non-marking sports footwear at all times 
2. Please ensure your valuables and personal belongings are not left unattended. The Management cannot be held liable for any theft or losses 
3. 1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.
3. Bookings that are affected by weather conditions (usage of less than 30 minutes) can be rescheduled, subject to availability of courts.
4. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests must be made within 24 hours of the original booking.
5. To reschedule, WhatsApp our hotline (+60 11-1123 4330) with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
6. No outside foods and beverages are allowed within the Las Palmas Pickleball Club premises.
7. In regards to any events and tournaments being hosted within Las Palmas Pickleball Club, strictly no outside food and beverages are allowed. All foods and beverages will be catered by Las Palmas's, Hula Cafe.

Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
2. All booking concerns please contact +601111234330 / +601112203260.

General Conduct & Usage
- Conduct: Players must maintain respectful behaviour at all times. Aggressive or abusive conduct will not be tolerated.
- Dress Code: Appropriate sports attire is required. Non-marking court shoes are mandatory.
- Arrival Time: Please arrive at least 10 minutes before your session. Sessions will end strictly on time.
- Parking: Limited parking is available. Please park considerately. Racquet Rojak is not responsible for any loss or damage to vehicles.
- Equipment Use: Users are responsible for any damage caused to court equipment.
- Cleanliness: Please dispose of litter properly and help keep the courts clean.
- Food & Drink: No food or glass containers are permitted on court. Only water or sports drinks in closed bottles are allowed.
- Children & Guests: Children must be supervised at all times. Spectators must remain off-court.

"Booking Refunds & Changes
1. No Refund or Carry Forward: Non-utilized sessions will neither be refunded nor carried forward under any circumstances.
2. 48 Hours Advance Notice: A minimum of 48 hours' notice is required for any changes to booking times. Changes are subject to court availability and must be made within the online booking system's scheduling window.
3. Rain Policy:
  - If play is interrupted by rain and the session is less than 30 minutes for a 1-hour booking or 60 minutes for a 2-hour booking, the session is eligible for rescheduling.
  - Rescheduling requests must be submitted to 011-27272791 (WhatsApp only) within 24 hours after the original session and are subject to court availability. 
  Reschedule Window:
  - The new booking date must fall within 21 days of the original booking date.
  - In this case, the rescheduled date must be between December 2, 2024, and December 22, 2024.
4. Late Changes or Cancellations: Changes or cancellations requested less than 48 hours in advance will result in the session being forfeited, except for cases covered under the Rain Policy.
5. No-Show Policy: If a booking is not attended, it will be marked as a no-show and is non-refundable.

Equipment Policy
1. Provided Equipment:
  - Each booking includes 2 free paddles and 1 ball for use during the session.
  - Additional equipment can be rented at the counter, subject to availability.
2. Damage or Loss of Equipment:
  - If provided equipment (paddles or balls) is lost or intentionally damaged, users will be charged RM 30 per paddle or as determined by the venue for other items.
  - Replacement fees must be settled immediately.

Safety & Liability
1. Personal Belongings: Do not leave valuables unattended. The venue is not responsible for any loss, theft, or damage to personal belongings.

  - Rescheduling requests must be submitted to +60197974140 (WhatsApp only) within 24 hours after the original session and are subject to court availability. 
  Reschedule Window:
  - The new booking date must fall within 21 days of the original booking date.
  - In this case, the rescheduled date must be between December 2, 2024, and December 22, 2024.
4. Late Changes or Cancellations: Changes or cancellations requested less than 48 hours in advance will result in the session being forfeited, except for cases covered under the Rain Policy.
5. No-Show Policy: If a booking is not attended, it will be marked as a no-show and is non-refundable.

Equipment Policy
1. Provided Equipment:
  - Each booking includes 2 free paddles and 1 ball for use during the session.
  - Additional equipment can be rented at the counter, subject to availability.
2. Damage or Loss of Equipment:
  - If provided equipment (paddles or balls) is lost or intentionally damaged, users will be charged RM 30 per paddle or as determined by the venue for other items.
  - Replacement fees must be settled immediately.

Safety & Liability
1. Personal Belongings: Do not leave valuables unattended. The venue is not responsible for any loss, theft, or damage to personal belongings.
2. Health & Safety: Users are responsible for ensuring they are physically fit to participate in activities. The venue is not liable for injuries sustained during use."}

Welcome to Pickle Lane Society!
 
1) Key in PIN
- At the entrance at level one, key in the PIN number provided
- ⁠PIN number: 2405#
 
2) Ready to play!
- Check the lane number you’ve booked. 
- ⁠The remote control is in the transparent pouch hanging on the net at/beside the entrance of the lane. 
- ⁠The lights above your lane will be on during your session.
- ⁠To play, press the “ON” green button on the remote and the machine will be powered on (you’ll hear a “beep” sound). After 15 seconds, the machine will shoot out balls.
 
3) Check out
- Once your session is up, the machine will automatically stop. 
- ⁠Kindly remember to return the remote by placing it in the transparent pouch. 
- ⁠To exit the venue, kindly press the “Door Exit” button beside the glass door to unlock the door.

Links for Video Guidance:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dXOZGNowCwkSY0yFapKH6Kyp5Y48Jk_6

For support, WhatsApp us at:
+6017-260 2363", "showRemarks": false, "announcement": "Please be informed that this is training lane rental with ball machine and kindly refer to self-check-in instructions under Booking Section once payment has been completed.", "announcementCreated": "2026-04-13T00:19:35.938Z"}

{"address": "Lot 57, Jalan Industri Semambu 5, Kawasan Perindustrian Semambu, Kuantan, Pahang", "cityAndState": "Kuantan, Pahang", "gMapsPlaceId": "ChIJ-e7GMQC7yDERcseA63Z0xEg", "amenities": ["freeParking", "shower", "drinks", "toilets"], "location": {"address": "Lot 57, Jalan Industri Semambu 5, Kawasan Perindustrian Semambu, Kuantan, Pahang", "city": "Kuantan", "state": "Pahang", "gMapsPlaceId": "ChIJ-e7GMQC7yDERcseA63Z0xEg"}, "registeredBusinessName": "Semambu Pickleball Park Sdn. Bhd.", "registeredBusinessNumber": "202501004196(1605609-D)", "phoneNumber": "‪+60172288911‬", "schedulerStart": "6", "schedulerEnd": "1", "centrePolicy": "1. Standard Bookings
Court bookings can be made up to 28 days in advance.
2. Rescheduling
Amendments to bookings must be made with a minimum of 48 hours’ prior notice and are limited to one change, subject to court availability. Replacement sessions must be arranged promptly and completed within 28 days of the original booking date.
3. Rain-Interrupted Sessions
In the event of rain, rescheduling is permitted in accordance with Section 2, provided that play in the affected hour has not exceeded thirty-five (35) minutes at the time of Interruption.
3.1. Definitions
a. “Rain” shall mean any form of precipitation, including but not limited to drizzle, showers, or storms, which renders the court surface wet or otherwise unsafe for continued play, as determined exclusively by the Management in its absolute discretion.
b. “Interruption” shall mean the cessation of Active Play due to Rain, whether by the decision of the players or upon instruction from the Management, where no further play is reasonably possible at that time.
c. “Active Play” shall be deemed to have commenced once the court has been made available to the Booking Holder and at least one rally or serve has taken place within the relevant booked hour.
d. “Duration of Play” shall be measured from the scheduled commencement time of the booked hour until the time of Interruption, irrespective of any late arrival, warm-up periods, or voluntary breaks taken by the players.
3.2. Examples (based on a two-hour booking from 4:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m.):
i. Interruption at 4:25 p.m. – Only 25 minutes of the session were used. The session is eligible to reschedule both hours, as the first hour was used for less than 35 minutes, and the second hour had not yet started.
ii. Interruption at 5:25 p.m. – 1 hour and 25 minutes were used. The first hour is ineligible (more than 35 minutes used), but the second hour (5:00 p.m.–6:00 p.m.) is eligible, as only 25 minutes were used.
iii. Interruption at 5:40 p.m. – 1 hour and 40 minutes were used. Both hours are ineligible, as more than 35 minutes were used in each.
4. Rate Adjustments on Rescheduling
If rescheduling from non-peak to peak hours, the rate difference will be charged. No refunds for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours.
5. Long-Term / Bundle Bookings (e.g. Every Thursday & Friday for 2 Months)
We offer 2-month advance bookings for fixed recurring court slots (e.g. every Thursday and Friday). To arrange, please be in touch with us for further details. Full payment is required upon confirmation.
6. Late Arrival and Booking Forfeiture
The court reserves the right to forfeit any booking if players are more than 30 minutes late without prior notice or response via our Hotline.
7. No-Shows & Refunds
No-shows shall result in the full forfeiture of the booking, with no refunds issued. All paid bookings are strictly non-refundable, regardless of the reason for cancellation or non-attendance. Unused sessions cannot be refunded, credited, or carried forward under any circumstances.

General Venue Terms & Conditions
1. Attire
All players must wear appropriate sports attire and non-marking sports footwear at all times while on the courts.
2. Personal Belongings
The Management is not liable for any theft, loss, or damage of personal items. Please safeguard your belongings.
3. Check-In Requirement
The booking holder or any member of the group must check in at the counter upon arrival before entering the court.
4. Punctuality & Session Timing
Court time begins as scheduled, regardless of the player's arrival time. No extensions or adjustments will be made for late arrivals.
5. Liability Waiver
Use of the facility is at your own risk. The Management is not responsible for injuries, accidents, damages, or fatalities within the premises.
6. Pets
Pets are strictly prohibited within the venue premises, including courts.
7. Food & Drinks
No outside food or drinks are permitted inside the venue.
8. Conduct
Abusive behavior, vandalism, or unsafe conduct may lead to removal from the venue without refund.
9. Venue Closures
The Management reserves the right to close courts temporarily for maintenance or events. Affected bookings will be rescheduled.
10. Photography & Media
The venue may take photos/videos for promotional purposes. Notify staff if you do not consent.

Contact Us
For all bookings, rescheduling, or general inquiries, please reach out to us via WhatsApp at +60 17 228 8911.", "socialMediaLinks": {"facebook": "https://www.facebook.com/share/16mXF6wXgX/?mibextid=wwXIfr", "instagram": "https://www.instagram.com/picklebee.my?igsh=MWIxbWFzMml2MnFjeA==", "twitter": "", "youtube": "", "website": "", "tiktok": 🏓 Standard Court (Open Court)

The core pickleball experience. These courts are arranged side-by-side, creating a vibrant social atmosphere. Ideal for recreational games or combining adjacent courts for large group bookings (Twin court setup).


🪽 Wing Court+ (Open Court)

Features extended dimensions and high fencing for a private playing environment. The secure perimeter maximises ball containment and minimises distractions, making it ideal for coaching, drills, or focused competitive matches.", "announcementCreated": "2026-04-01T02:26:45.640Z"}

ATP Club is a welcoming space in Masai, Johor Bahru where pickleball players of all levels can feel at home. With 12 fully indoor courts, high ceilings, and strong ventilation, every game stays comfortable, rain or shine. The club features clean and convenient amenities, including surau and hot showers, as well as a pro shop stocked with paddles, balls, and accessories. Booking a court is fast and easy through Courtsite. Whether you're here to join a class, play a match, or simply explore, ATP Club is open to everyone.

1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilised sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.

NO FOOD AND DRINKS ON COURT
1. STRICTLY NO FOOD allowed on the court.
2. Only plain water and isotonic drinks (e.g. 100PLUS, Gatorade, Pocari Sweat) are allowed. No sweet drinks, soda, coffee, tea, or flavoured beverages.
3. Drinks must be sealed and kept off the court surface.
4. Spills must be reported and cleaned immediately.

DRESS CODE
1. Wear proper athletic attire and non-marking court shoes. Bare feet, slippers, or hard-soled shoes are not allowed.

EQUIPMENT
1. Only approved pickleball paddles and balls are allowed.
2. Please return rented paddles back to the locker.

FACILITY USE AND CLEANLINESS
1. Keep the court and surrounding area clean and tidy.Use designated bins for all trash.
2. DO NOT lean, hang, or pull on netting.
3. Any damage to facility property may result in charges and suspension or ban from the venue.

OTHERS
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.

1. Court bookings open at 12:00:01am each day.
2. Each court booking can be rescheduled once with at least 48 hours' notice via booking management on Courtsite, subject to availability.
3. Rain-interrupted sessions can be rescheduled to a time within one month from the original booking date, subject to availability.
4. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests (less than 35 min usage) must be made within 48 hours of the original booking. Weather conditions will be validated via mall CCTV.
5. To reschedule, WhatsApp +60378904143 with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
6. For reschedules from non-peak to peak hours, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours.
7. No-shows are forfeited without refunds.
8. Refunds for bookings paid are not allowed.
 
Others:
1. For safety and injury avoidance, please wear appropriate non-marking sports footwear at all times.
2. Please ensure your valuables and personal belongings are not left unattended. The Management cannot be held liable for any theft or losses.
3. The Management is not responsible for any mishaps, damages, losses, injuries, or fatalities that occur within our premises.
4. The Hideout does not provide any equipment for free or rental basis to facilitate games.", "schedulerStart": 6, "schedulerEnd": 2, "remarks": "🚨📢🔔⚠️Courtsite Reminder
⚠️Please bring your own paddles and pickleballs! This venue do not provide any equipment rental.
🚨📢🔔⚠️

Check here for parking rebates!
https://thelinckl.com.my/get-here/
(More information at "Directions" section)

The Hideout is an unmanned, private rooftop court space at The Linc — designed for those who enjoy padel, pickleball, and a quiet escape tucked within the city. Some things to keep in mind:

•	Equipment rental is not available on-site — so do bring along your own padel or pickleball gear for your session.
•	Your booking is yours — and only for the time you’ve reserved. Please leave promptly to avoid delays for the next group.
•	No littering — if you bring food or drinks, please clean up after yourself and don’t leave rubbish behind.
•	Proper footwear only — non-marking sports shoes are required for your safety and to protect the court.
•	Please keep an eye on your personal belongings — The Hideout is not responsible for any loss or theft.
•	All play is at your own risk — The Hideout is not liable for any injury, damage, or incident that may occur on the premises.

Booking Policy
•	Each booking may be rescheduled once via your own Courtsite account, with at least 24 hours’ notice and subject to availability. No refunds or rescheduling is allowed within 24 hours of the booking time.
•	If your session is interrupted by rain (less than 35 minutes session), it may be rescheduled to a later date within one month of the original booking, subject to availability. Rain-related rescheduling requests must be submitted within 48 hours of the original session via WhatsApp at +60 3-7890 4143.
•	All bookings are non-refundable once confirmed.
•	The Hideout reserves the right to amend its policies, rates, or terms at any time without prior notice, and to cancel or deny access or bookings where necessary to maintain the integrity, safety, and intended use of the space.
", "showRemarks": true, "directions": "1. Head to the Level 2 open rooftop.
2. Enter the glass door on your right upon exiting Lax Retreat.
3. Turn left and take the flight of stairs up to reach The Hideout.

Tips
Check here for parking rebates!

1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of non-utilised sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability.
3. Rain-interrupted sessions can be rescheduled to a time within one month from the original booking date, subject to availability.
4. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests must be made within 48 hours of the original booking.
5. To reschedule, call our Hot Line (+60364365073 ) with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.

Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
2. User shall indemnify and hold harmless the School and any of its employees, representatives, 
agents, contractors, and volunteers from any and all losses, liabilities, claims, lawsuits, 
allegations, expenses and all forms of including attorney fees and recoverable costs or 
expenses arising out of the use and/or occupation of the property belonging to the School by 
the user group and any of its officers, employees, agents, contractors, and volunteers, except 
to the extent that such loss arises from the independent negligence of the School. 
3. User undertakes sole responsibility of the safety of all the users and/or participants and the 
School will not be responsible for any injury incurred during the use of its facility. 
4. User must observe and comply with the school health and safety practices, which includes Fire 
regulations at all time, which include but not necessarily limited to the following: 
o Signing in all attendees/participants at the security guard booth at the main entrance; 
o Stairways, corridors and entrance/exits must be kept free of obstruction at all times; 
o On hearing the lightning alarm all persons must move from outdoors to covered areas; 
o User and the person in-charge of the event is responsible for monitoring weather 
conditions and evacuating playing fields of participants and spectators when the threat 
of lightning or dangerous conditions approaches. The person in-charge will cancel 
games when field or playing conditions could cause harm or damage to participants or 
to the facilities. 
5. Ensure that there is adequate adult leadership and supervision at all times especially where 
there are children and/or minors attending/participating. 
6. User agrees that the use of the facility rental:   
o Does not cause interference with the orderly functioning of the School or infringe upon 
the rights or privileges of others; these rights include the right to peaceful pursuit of 
school activities and to enjoy the rule of law.  All boisterous or nuisance persons will 
be asked to leave the school’s grounds with immediate effect. 
o Shall be confined to the hired areas and booking times, and shall not encroach into 
other areas unless they are common public areas that the school as approved. 
o Must not exceed the maximum capacity of the facility and the User will be held 
financially responsible for any damages to the facility or loss or replacement of any 
equipment that is damaged or lost that may be incurred as a result of their activity.  
o Will be used only for the activities for which they have been designated.  
o Users are to leave the changing rooms and toilets in a clean and tidy state. 
7. The following are strictly prohibited in the school grounds: 
o Use or consumption of alcohol and/or drugs 
o Use of tobacco 
o Bear any weapons or items that pose health and safety issues 
o Gambling 
o Use of obscene language 
o Engage in quarrelling, fighting or non-compliance with school regulations 
o Other illegal or prohibited or immoral activities/behaviours deemed as offensive to the 
school common 
o Pet(s)  
8. The School reserves the right to cancel the booking if it is unable to hold up its 
obligations for reasons including but not limited to emergency conditions or

"centrePolicy": "Booking Refunds & Changes
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.
3. Bookings that are affected by weather conditions (usage of less than 30 minutes) can be rescheduled, subject to availability of courts.
4. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests must be made within 48 hours of the original booking. 
5. To reschedule, WhatsApp our hotline (+60169200896) with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.

Starbucks at The Strand Mall.
2. The Training Court is located at level 2, near pro shop. Take escalator from Starbucks (level G).", "centrePolicy": "Booking Refunds & Changes
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.

Equipment & Attire
1.	Paddles & Balls
- Bring your own paddles & balls or prebook your paddle rental and ball purchase
- Use only indoor/outdoor pickleballs as designated by court conditions.
2.	Eyewear & Footwear
2(a). Anti-glare eyewear suited for outdoor sports recommended during daytime play
2(b). Pickleball shoes or Non-Marking court shoes are mandatory during play to minimize injury and protect damage to court floor surface
3.	Attire
- Comfortable sports attire is recommended.
- Shirts must be worn at all times.
Safety & Hygiene
4.	Children & Non-Players
- Children must be supervised at all times.
- Spectators are welcome in designated viewing areas only, subject to property owner rules.
5.	Injuries 
- Inform staff of any injuries or emergencies if help is needed.
- First-aid kits are available at reception.
6.	Clean Up After Yourself
- Dispose of bottles, tape, wrappers, etc. in bins provided.
- Leave the court as you found it.
7.	Personal Belongings
- Please take care of your personal belongings. Management is not responsible for any loss or damage.
8. 1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.

Rain Policy
1. If it rains and you lose half or more of your booking time, we will reschedule you to another available slot (within 1 month).
2. If it rains after half your booking time, no reschedule or refund will be given.
3. You must confirm your new booking within 7 days, otherwise it will be counted as a no show
4. Rain-affected sessions can be rescheduled to a time within one month from the original booking date, subject to availability. 
5. To reschedule, WhatsApp +60104647102 with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
6. For reschedules from non-peak to peak hours, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours.

1. BOOKING REFUNDS & CHANGES / Penjadualan Semula & Bayaran Balik

No Refunds or Carry Forward
All bookings are non-refundable. Unused sessions cannot be carried forward or exchanged for future dates.
Semua tempahan adalah tidak boleh dikembalikan bayaran. Sesi yang tidak digunakan tidak boleh dibawa ke hadapan atau diganti tarikh.

Change of Booking Time
Any request to reschedule must be made at least 72 hours in advance of the booked session.
Rescheduling is subject to court availability and limited to one (1) change per booking.
Requests made within 72 hours of the play date will not be entertained.

Bookings can be rescheduled directly by customers through the Courtsite platform, provided it is done at least 72 hours BEFORE play.

Tempahan boleh dijadualkan semula oleh pelanggan secara terus dalam Courtsite, dengan syarat ia dibuat sekurang-kurangnya 72 jam SEBELUM tarikh permainan.
Sebarang permohonan untuk menukar masa tempahan mestilah dibuat sekurang-kurangnya 72 jam lebih awal daripada tarikh tempahan.
Penukaran adalah tertakluk kepada kekosongan gelanggang dan hanya dibenarkan sekali (1) sahaja bagi setiap tempahan.
Permohonan yang dibuat dalam tempoh 72 jam sebelum tarikh permainan tidak akan dilayan.

2. SAFETY & RESPONSIBILITY / Keselamatan & Tanggungjawab

Your safety is our priority. While we have prepared basic first-aid kits within the premises, please note that play is at your own risk. Kindly take care of yourself and fellow players while enjoying the game.
Keselamatan anda adalah keutamaan kami. Walaupun kami telah menyediakan kit pertolongan cemas di dalam premis, permainan dijalankan atas risiko sendiri. Sila jaga keselamatan diri dan rakan pemain semasa bermain.

3. FOOD & BEVERAGES / Makanan & Minuman

Help us keep the court clean and enjoyable for everyone. We kindly ask that no outside food be brought into the premises. Food and drinks are available at our café for your convenience.
Minta kerjasama pelanggan yang dihormati untuk mengekalkan kebersihan dan keselesaan bagi semua. Kami mohon agar makanan dari luar tidak dibawa masuk ke dalam premis. Makanan dan minuman disediakan di kafe kami untuk kemudahan anda.

4. PHOTOGRAPHY & VIDEO CONSENT / Kebenaran Gambar & Video

By entering our premises, you acknowledge and consent that photos or videos may be taken for promotional or social media purposes. We aim to share the joy of pickleball with the community.
Dengan memasuki premis ini, anda bersetuju bahawa gambar atau video anda mungkin dirakam untuk tujuan promosi atau media sosial. Kami ingin berkongsi kegembiraan sukan pickleball bersama komuniti.

5. OTHERS / Lain-Lain

Please do not leave valuables unattended. The management will not be responsible for any loss or theft.
Sila jangan tinggalkan barang berharga tanpa pengawasan. Pihak pengurusan tidak akan bertanggungjawab atas sebarang kehilangan atau kecurian.

6. POLICY CHANGES / Perubahan Polisi

Please note that this policy may be updated or revised from time to time at the management’s discretion, without prior notice.
Sila ambil perhatian bahawa polisi ini mungkin dikemas kini atau disemak dari semasa ke semasa mengikut budi bicara pihak pengurusan, tanpa notis awal.", "announcement": "Paddles & balls are available for rental at the venue.

1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions. 
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.

Rain Affected Bookings:

* DRIZZLE: If play has not started, the session may be rescheduled to another available slot. If play continues for more than 15 minutes in light rain and weather conditions remain unchanged, no rescheduling or refunds will be provided should players decide to stop mid-session.
Example 1:
Patrick had been playing for 15 minutes in light drizzle when he decided to stop and reschedule the rest of his session, despite there being no changes in the weather conditions. In this case, his session cannot be rescheduled.

* ﻿﻿HEAVY RAIN: If heavy rain prevents play pre or mid-session, unutilized time may be rescheduled. Weather conditions will be verified with the staff on duty. Any remaining unutilized time will be rounded up to the closest next half hour. If the remaining time is 0.5 or 1.5 hours, an additional half hour (chargeable) will be required for the rescheduled session, due to the minimum booking interval of 1 hour.
Example 2:
Victoria had been playing for 30 minutes when the weather conditions worsened, forcing him to stop his session. In this scenario, the remaining unutilized time from his session can be rescheduled.

1. Rescheduling requests due to rain must be made within 24 hours of the original booking. Any requests made after this period will not be accepted.
2. To reschedule, WhatsApp us +603-78904143 with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
3. For reschedules from outdoor to indoor courts, the rates’ difference will be chargeable.

3. Rain-affected bookings rescheduling policy:
- Bookings can be rescheduled if it is affected by weather conditions (applicable for outdoor courts only) 
- ⁠If it rains for more than 20 minutes of playtime, booking can be rescheduled, subject to availability of courts. 
- ⁠If it rains less than 20 minutes of playtime, rescheduling is not allowed. 
- ⁠Rain-affected rescheduling requests must be made within 3 days of the original booking. 
- ⁠Rain-affected sessions can be rescheduled to a time within 10 days from the original booking date, subject to availability.
- ⁠For reschedules from Outdoor Court to Covered Court, the rates’ difference will be chargeable.
- ⁠For reschedules from Non-Peak Hour to Peak Hour, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours

"amenities": ["carpark", "shower", "shop", "drinks", "food"], "centrePolicy": "Booking Refunds & Changes:
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions. 
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.

Rain Affected Bookings:

• DRIZZLE: If play has not started, the session may be rescheduled to another available slot. If play continues for more than 15 minutes in light rain and weather conditions remain unchanged, no rescheduling or refunds will be provided should players decide to stop mid-session.
Example 1:
Patrick had been playing for 15 minutes in light drizzle when he decided to stop and reschedule the rest of his session, despite there being no changes in the weather conditions. In this case, his session cannot be rescheduled.

• ﻿﻿HEAVY RAIN: If heavy rain prevents play pre or mid-session, unutilized time may be rescheduled. Weather conditions will be verified with the staff on duty. Any remaining unutilized time will be rounded up to the closest next half hour. If the remaining time is 0.5 or 1.5 hours, an additional half hour (chargeable) will be required for the rescheduled session, due to the minimum booking interval of 1 hour.
Example 2:
Victoria had been playing for 30 minutes when the weather conditions worsened, forcing him to stop his session. In this scenario, the remaining unutilized time from his session can be rescheduled.

1. Rescheduling requests due to rain must be made within 24 hours of the original booking. Any requests made after this period will not be accepted.
2. To reschedule, WhatsApp our Hot Line (+60378904143 ) with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
3. For reschedules from outdoor to indoor courts, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. 

Others 
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft. Changes
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.
3. Rain-affected sessions can be rescheduled to a time within 7 days from the original booking date, subject to availability.
4. Rain-affected rescheduling requests must be made within 30 mins of the original booking.
5. To reschedule via counter/WhatsApp number (017-2108775) with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
6. The rates' difference will be chargeable for reschedules from non-peak to peak hours. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours.
7. No-shows are forfeited without refunds.
8. Refunds for bookings paid are not allowed.

Others

1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.", "announcement": "", "announcementCreated": "2025-04-01T00:11:49.063Z", "remarks": "PICKLEBALL COURT DISCLAIMER AND NOTICE OF ASSUMPTION OF RISK

Welcome to the pickleball courts at Dink Avenue. By entering and using these courts, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

1. Assumption of Risk

Participation in pickleball and related activities involves inherent risks, including but not limited to physical injury, slips, trips, falls, collisions with other players, exposure to weather conditions, equipment-related accidents, and overexertion. By using this facility, you voluntarily assume full responsibility for all risks, both known and unknown, associated with the use of the pickleball courts.

2. Waiver of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Dink Avenue, its owners, management, employees, agents, and affiliates shall not be held liable for any injury, loss, damage, or death arising from your use of the courts, whether caused by negligence or otherwise. This includes but is not limited to accidents during play, improper use of equipment, acts of other participants, or environmental factors such as court surface conditions.

3. Personal Responsibility

All players and visitors are expected to:
	•	Ensure they are in proper physical condition to participate.
	•	Use appropriate footwear and equipment.
	•	Hydrate adequately and rest as needed.
	•	Follow all posted rules, signage, and staff instructions.
	•	Refrain from reckless, aggressive, or inappropriate behavior.
	•	Supervise minors at all times. Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult.

You are solely responsible for securing your personal belongings. Dink Avenue is not responsible for any lost, damaged, or stolen property.

4. Medical Emergencies

In the event of a medical emergency, staff or other participants may seek emergency medical assistance on your behalf. You agree to bear any costs associated with such assistance.

5. Use of Facility and Compliance

By entering the premises:
	•	You agree to comply with all local regulations, rules of play, and conduct policies established by Dink Avenue.
	•	You grant permission to be photographed or recorded for promotional or safety purposes unless otherwise requested in writing.

6. Acknowledgment

Your presence on the court indicates that you have read, understood, and accepted this disclaimer and voluntarily release Dink Avenue and its representatives from all liability. If you do not agree to these terms, you should refrain from using the pickleball courts.

Play at your own risk. Respect others. Stay safe.", "showRemarks": "true", "price": "Opening Promo Price

"General Terms
• No refunds, cancellations or carry forward of unused sessions
• Each booking may only be rescheduled twice, subject to availability
• At least 48 hours’ notice is required to postpone any booking
• Bookings may be brought forward to an earlier slot

Rain-Affected Bookings
• Heavy rain (continuous rain affecting visibility or court safety and usability) or standing water (accumulated water posing safety risk) may qualify for rescheduling if lasting more than 30 minutes
• Rescheduling requests must be made within 24 hours of the original booking time with a timestamped photo or video clearly showing rain or wet court conditions
• Rescheduled sessions must take place within one month of the original booking date, subject to availability

Footwear
• Non-marking court shoes only
• No black soles, spikes, sandals, or boots

Court Use
• Courts are for social play
• Events (e.g., tournaments, corporate functions, parties) must be informed at least one month in advance, and are subject to a refundable deposit (forfeited if policy is violated) 
• Play only during your booked slot and vacate promptly after
• Management reserves the right to modify bookings as necessary for operational reasons (e.g., maintenance or events).

Food & Drinks
• No outside food or drinks, including alcohol
• All catering must be arranged through Management
• Any food or drinks brought in outside of this channel will be removed

Children
• Children under 12 must be supervised by an adult at all times
• Parents / guardians must control children’s behaviour on and off court

Courtesy
• Respect all players, staff, and property
• No unruly behaviour or disruptions or interfere with other players’ games or courts
• Show good sportsmanship at all times

Cleaning & Damages
• Leave courts as you found them; cleaning fees may apply if wastes are left behind
• Players are liable for any damages

Health & Safety
• Play at your own risk
• No smoking or vaping

1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilised sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability.
3. In the event the CENTRE is required to be closed for internal purposes, we will give you prior notice and will arrange for your booking to be rescheduled.
4. Plays impacted by wet flooring due to weather can be rescheduled if not exceeding 30 mins of play, subject to availability of subsequent slots, or push-back of subsequent slots. CENTRE will have the sole discretion to decide and advise whether the condition is a safe environment to play. A video is required to provided by players as an evidence.

Others
1. This is a strictly NON-SMOKING CENTRE and no warning will be given. 
2. Leave immediately after your session to allow for the next incoming group of players to start their session.
3. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
4. Players are only allowed to enter the CENTRE 15 minutes before the game and no spectators are allowed.
5. Vandalism involving functional/cosmetic damage to property belonging to the CENTRE is a very serious offence. Player found guilty of committing such an offence will be evicted from the Centre. The cost of making good any item vandalized will be billed accordingly to the Player.
6. Kindly note that the CENTRE reserves the rights to deny entry or to end your session and remove you from the CENTRE if you do not adhere to our Policy.", "announcement": "", "announcementCreated": "2025-06-30T05:27:51.557Z", "remarks": "Please note: Pickleball bookings come with 2 balls only, and paddles can be rented at RM5 per session over the counter.

2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability.
3. In the event the CENTRE is required to be closed for internal purposes, we will give you prior notice and will arrange for your booking to be rescheduled.
4. Plays impacted by wet flooring due to weather can be rescheduled if not exceeding 30 mins of play, subject to availability of subsequent slots, or push-back of subsequent slots. CENTRE will have the sole discretion to decide and advise whether the condition is a safe environment to play. A video is required to provided by players as an evidence.

Others
1. This is a strictly NON-SMOKING CENTRE and no warning will be given. 
2. Leave immediately after your session to allow for the next incoming group of players to start their session.
3. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
4. Players are only allowed to enter the CENTRE 15 minutes before the game and no spectators are allowed.
5. Vandalism involving functional/cosmetic damage to property belonging to the CENTRE is a very serious offence. Player found guilty of committing such an offence will be evicted from the Centre. The cost of making good any item vandalized will be billed accordingly to the Player.
6. Kindly note that the CENTRE reserves the rights to deny entry or to end your session and remove you from the CENTRE if you do not adhere to our Policy.", "showRemarks": "true", "price": "Pickleball

• No refunds, cancellations or carry forward of unused sessions
• Each booking may only be rescheduled twice, subject to availability
• At least 48 hours’ notice is required to postpone any booking
• Bookings may be brought forward to an earlier slot

Footwear
• Non-marking court shoes only
• No black soles, spikes, sandals, or boots

Court Use
• Courts are for social play
• Events (e.g., tournaments, corporate functions, parties) must be informed at least one month in advance, and are subject to a refundable deposit (forfeited if policy is violated) 
• Play only during your booked slot and vacate promptly after
• Management reserves the right to modify bookings as necessary for operational reasons (e.g., maintenance or events).

Food & Drinks
• No outside food or drinks, including alcohol
• All catering must be arranged through Management
• Any food or drinks brought in outside of this channel will be removed

Children
• Children under 12 must be supervised by an adult at all times
• Parents / guardians must control children’s behaviour on and off court

Courtesy
• Respect all players, staff, and property
• No unruly behaviour or disruptions or interfere with other players’ games or courts
• Show good sportsmanship at all times

Cleaning & Damages
• Leave courts as you found them; cleaning fees may apply if wastes are left behind
• Players are liable for any damages

Health & Safety
• Play at your own risk
• No smoking or vaping", "announcement": "📣 Heads up! Our new Venue Policy starts on 15 December 2025. Be sure to read it before your next booking! 😏

1. Court bookings can be made up to two weeks in advance.
2. Court bookings open at 12:00:01am each day.
3. Each court booking can be rescheduled once with at least 24 hours' notice, subject to availability. To reschedule, WhatsApp +60128285661 with your booking reference and preferred date/time.
4. Rain-interrupted sessions can be rescheduled to a time within one month from the original booking date, subject to availability. 
5. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests must be made within 48 hours of the original booking.
6. To reschedule, WhatsApp our Hot Line (+60128285661) with your booking reference and new preferred date and time.
7. For reschedules from non-peak to peak hours, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours.
8. No-shows are forfeited without refunds.
9. Refunds for bookings paid are not allowed.

Others:
1. For safety and injury avoidance, please wear appropriate non-marking sports footwear at all times
2. Please ensure your valuables and personal belongings are not left unattended. The Management cannot be held liable for any theft or losses
3. The Management is not responsible for any mishaps, damages, losses, injuries, or fatalities that occur within our premises
4. This centre is pet-friendly, but pets are not allowed on the courts. Owners must ensure their pets do not interfere with activities and clean up after them.
5. No outside food and drinks are allowed.", "announcement": "Court 1 is open for bookings 🤗", "announcementCreated": "2025-08-11T08:38:01.375Z", "remarks": "Refunds are not allowed. Bookings can be rescheduled due to rain or if requested more than 48 hours before play. 

Rain-interrupted rescheduling policy:
1. Rain-interrupted sessions under 35 mins can be rescheduled to a time within one month from the original booking date, subject to availability.
2. Rain-interrupted rescheduling requests must be made within 48 hours of the original booking.
3. Whatsapp +60378904143 to reschedule.

Others:
1. Paddles for rent and balls for sale are available at the registration counter.
2. Paddles rental: House paddle - RM5 per paddle, Premium paddle - RM20 per paddle per hour.
3. 1. Tiada bayaran balik, tiada penjadualan semula dan tiada penghantaran ke hadapan bagi sesi yang tidak digunakan.
2. Dengan notis awal, Pengurusan mempunyai hak untuk menjadualkan semula tempahan dalam talian jika perlu.

Lain-lain
1. Tolong jangan tinggalkan barang berharga anda tanpa pengawasan. Kami tidak akan bertanggungjawab atas sebarang kecurian.
2. Dilarang merokok dan vape di kemudahan kawasan sukan kami. Anda hanya boleh merokok atau vape di kawasan merokok yang ditetapkan di luar rumah.
3. Pihak Pengurusan berhak untuk mengeluarkan mana-mana orang yang bertindak tidak terkawal atau bertentangan dengan polisi kami dari premis kami dan tiada bayaran balik akan diberikan dalam keadaan sedemikian.
4. Pihak Pengurusan tidak akan bertanggungjawab ke atas sebarang kemalangan, kerosakan, kehilangan, kecederaan, atau kematian apa jua yang timbul daripada atau berkaitan dengan penggunaan kemudahan dan/atau peralatan sukan di gelanggang kami.
5. Kenderaan dan kandungannya ditinggalkan di tempat letak kereta kami atas risiko pemilik sendiri. Kami tidak bertanggungjawab terhadap sebarang kehilangan atau kerosakan pada kenderaan atau kandungannya yang berlaku di kawasan gelanggang kami.
6. Pihak Pengurusan berhak untuk menukar Polisi Pusat apabila diperlukan tanpa notis terlebih dahulu.

Booking Refunds & Changes
1. Strictly no refund, no rescheduling, and no carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. With advance notice, Management has the right to reschedule online bookings where necessary.

Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft at badminton court or its vicinity.
2. Strictly no smoking and vaping in our sports facility. You may only smoke or vape at the designated smoking areas outdoors.
3. The Management reserves the right to remove any person acting unruly or in contrary to our policy from our premises and strictly no refund will be given in such a situation.
4. The Management shall not be liable for any mishap, damage, loss, injury, or death whatsoever arising from or in connection with the use of our sports facility and/or equipment in our vicinity.
5. Vehicles and their contents are left at our car park at the owner's own risk. We do not accept responsibility for any loss or damage to vehicles or their contents that occur in our vicinity.
6. The Management reserves the right to change the Centre Policy as and when required without prior notice.

Harmonium, Taman Desa Tebrau, 81100 Johor Bahru, Johor", "cityAndState": "Johor Bahru, Johor Darul Ta'zim", "amenities": ["aed", "carpark", "shower", "shop", "food", "drinks", "surau"], "directions": "From Toppen Shopping Centre
1. At level 1, take the escalator near Hush Puppies.
2. At level 2, take the escalator near Daiso.
3. Once you reach level 3, walks towards The Parenthood then turn left.
4. Take the esacalator to level 4 and here we are!

For Driving customers
1. Park at the multi storey car park.
2. Go into the lift lobby.
3. Take the lift to level "R" and here we are!
", "centrePolicy": "General Terms
• No refunds, cancellations or carry forward of unused sessions
• Each booking may only be rescheduled twice, subject to availability
• At least 48 hours’ notice is required to postpone any booking
• Bookings may be brought forward to an earlier slot

Footwear
• Non-marking court shoes only
• No black soles, spikes, sandals, or boots

Court Use
• Courts are for social play
• Events (e.g., tournaments, corporate functions, parties) must be informed at least one month in advance, and are subject to a refundable deposit (forfeited if policy is violated) 
• Play only during your booked slot and vacate promptly after
• Management reserves the right to modify bookings as necessary for operational reasons (e.g., maintenance or events).

Food & Drinks
• No outside food or drinks, including alcohol
• All catering must be arranged through Management
• Any food or drinks brought in outside of this channel will be removed

Children
• Children under 12 must be supervised by an adult at all times
• Parents / guardians must control children’s behaviour on and off court

Courtesy
• Respect all players, staff, and property
• No unruly behaviour or disruptions or interfere with other players’ games or courts
• Show good sportsmanship at all times

Cleaning & Damages
• Leave courts as you found them; cleaning fees may apply if wastes are left behind
• Players are liable for any damages

Health & Safety
• Play at your own risk
• No smoking or vaping", "announcement": "📣 Heads up! Our new Venue Policy starts on 15 December 2025. Be sure to read it before your next booking! 😏  
📆 All event bookings must be made with us via Whatsapp at +6014-932 6080.", "announcementCreated": "2025-12-14T17:07:16.648Z", "remarks": "📣 Our new Venue Policy takes effect on 15 December 2025.  
Check it out before your session - game on under the new rules! 🫡  
 
For any event-related bookings, please reach out to our Customer Service Team for assistance. Online booking is solely for casual play sessions. Setia Ecohill 43500 Semenyih Selangor Darul Ehsan", "cityAndState": "Semenyih, Selangor", "amenities": ["shower", "carpark", "surau"], "directions": "1. Locate the Club 360 Welcome Centre.
2. Park on Level 1 or Level 2.
3. Take the lift to Level 3.

*After 9PM bookings, players may request access to the venue facilities by presenting booking confirmation to security guard.", "centrePolicy": "Booking Refunds & Changes
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.
3. Limitation guest as below
- Badminton = 8 pax per court per booking
- Basketball = 14 pax per court per booking
- Futsal = 14 pax per court per booking
- Table Tennis = 3 guest per table [FOC for Club Member only]

Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
2. Children BELOW TWELVE (12) years old are not allowed on the courts and within the facilities premises except with parental/guardian supervision at all times.
3. Proper, clean and presentable attire should be worn on the courts. T-shirts with sleeves, shorts, track bottoms, sports shoes and socks shall be worn.  Jeans, slippers, sandals, sharp or heeled shoes of any kind are not allowed.  Singlet and ‘cut offs’ are not allowed. 
4. Smooth soled shoes with non-marking soles shall be worn. Shoes with studs or spikes or black soled shoes are not permitted. 
5. Only approved types of equipment shall be used.  Racquets with sharp edges which are not protected are not permitted. 
6. Do treat the equipment with respect and report any damage(s) or defect(s) observed to the Club Management immediately. 
7. All facilities in the courts shall not be removed from its designated place. 
8. Please take care of your personal belongings. The Management will not be responsible for any loss or damage to personal property. 
9. Members/Guests under the influence of alcohol and drugs shall be prohibited from using any of the indoor sports centre facilities. 
10. No smoking, eating, food and beverages, reservation, commercial business, pets, unethical conduct, religious, immoral or political assembly, screaming or shouting, play loud audio/media from smartphones, having conversation through phones loudly while exercise, littering, spitting and/or any improper conduct in or around the facilities.   
11. No user shall under any circumstances whatsoever take away or to be permitted to take away from the Club premises or damage or destroy the property of the Club. In the event that any user, i.e Club Member, Family Member, Patron, Guests takes away or damages the property of the Club, the Member shall pay to the Club the costs of making good the damage or the costs of replacement of such property. The amount of such costs shall be assessed by the Management and the decision shall be final.
12. The Management shall not be liable in any manner whatsoever for loss of or damage to any person, property, injury, embarrassment or death of any person in the use of the facilities.  Users are advised to consult physician concerning fitness level before using the facilities.  All activities in and around the facilities present certain inherent risks and hazards which users USE AT YOUR OWN RISK as it is not supervised.  The Management reserves the right to amend, alter, vary or change any or all the above rules and regulations for the facilities from time to time as it deems necessary.   
13. In case of emergency, please contact Club’s personnel on duty for immediate assistance.", "announcement": "Reminder: Our pickleball paddles and balls (for rent), as well as futsal balls (for borrowing), are available from 7 AM to 9 PM only.

1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilised sessions. 
2. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability. 
3. Plays impacted by wet flooring due to weather can be rescheduled if not exceeding 30 minutes of play. If the duration played is less than half of the total booking time, we will reschedule another session accordingly. However, if customer have played for more than half of the session, no replacement will be provided.
**CENTRE will have the sole discretion to decide and advise whether the condition is a safe environment to play. A video is REQUIRED to be provided by players as an evidence to reschedule.
4. To reschedule, WhatsApp our Hot Line with your booking reference and new preferred date and time. 
5. In the event the CENTRE is required to be closed for internal purposes, we will give you prior notice and will arrange for your booking to be rescheduled. 
6. For reschedules from non-peak to peak hours, the rates’ difference will be chargeable. No refunds will be given for reschedules from peak to non-peak hours. 
7. No-shows are forfeited without refunds. 

Others 
1. For paddle rental, only 4 paddles are available for each booking. 
2. Non-smoking/vaping area, once found no warning will be given, the management has the right to terminate the session, no refund, and the players have to leave the property area immediately. 
3. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft. 
4. For safety and injury avoidance, please wear appropriate non-marking sports footwear at all times 
5. Vandalism involving functional/cosmetic damage to property belonging to the centre (or the property's owner) is a very serious offence. Player found guilty of committing such an offence will be evicted from the centre. The cost of making good any item vandalized will be billed accordingly to the player. 
6. The Management reserves the right to remove any person acting unruly or in contrary to our policy from our premises and strictly no refund will be given in such a situation. 
7. Kindly note that the centre reserves the rights to deny entry or to end your session and remove you from the centre if you do not adhere to our Policy. 
8. The Management shall not be liable for any mishap, damage, loss, injury, or death whatsoever arising from or in connection with the use of our sports facility and/or equipment. 
9. By making the booking, you agree that all players, spectators, and guests accept the terms and conditions stated above. 
10. The Management reserves the right to change the Centre Policy as and when required without prior notice.
11. Strictly for badminton use only. Other activities such as fitness classes, dance sessions, private events, or commercial filming are not permitted.", "showRemarks": "", "price": "Monday - Friday

Rain Policy
1. If play is interrupted by rain and the session is less than 50% complete, the session is eligible for a full reschedule.
2. If play is interrupted by rain after 50% of the session is completed, a reschedule will offered for the remaining time, rounded up to the nearest hour. 
This only applies to bookings with a minimum duration of 2 hours.
3. Reschedules to peak hours will incur rate differences. No refunds for peak-to-non-peak changes.
4. Submit rescheduling requests via WhatsApp to 010-8031189 within 24 hours of the original session.
5. Rain-affected reschedules must be used within 4 weeks of the original booking date and are subject to court availability.
6. No-shows will be forfeited without refund or reschedule.

Upon entering the school compound, the tennis and futsal court will be located on your left whereas the badminton, pickleball and netball court will be on  your right.", "centrePolicy": "Booking Refunds & Changes
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.
2. 72 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.
3. Bookings that are affected by weather conditions can be rescheduled, subject to the availability of courts. To reschedule your booking, simply WA through this number +601110932918.
4. Rain-affected rescheduling requests must be made within 72 hours of the original booking. Bookings that are interrupted midway due to unfavorable weather conditions, the remaining unused booking time may be reschedule to another available time slot, subject to availability.

Others
1. The centre has the right to fine you if any damages are found on the property or equipments after your booking.
2. Smoking is STRICTLY PROHIBITED within the premises of the Centre.
3. All customers are required to register at the Gate C security guard house before entering the centre.
4. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.
5. Please maintain the cleanliness of this premise.", "remarks": "Booking Refunds & Changes  
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.

3. Bookings that are affected by weather conditions can be rescheduled, subject to the availability of courts. To reschedule your booking, simply WA through this number +601110932918 before your booking starts. For bookings that are already halfway, rescheduling won't be possible, but time can be delayed.  
4. All court bookings are eligible for a one-time reschedule only. 

Others

2. Smoking is STRICTLY PROHIBITED within the premises of the Centre.
3. All customers are required to register at the Gate C security guard house before entering the centre.   
4. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.

"registeredBusinessName": "Taylor's International School (KL) Sdn. Bhd.", "registeredBusinessNumber": "199001013246", "phoneNumber": "+60364155000", "address": "9 Jalan 1/75C, Off Jalan Pria, Taman Maluri, 55100 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan, Malaysia", "cityAndState": "Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur", "amenities": ["carpark", "drinks", "toilets"], "directions": "Taylor’s International School Kuala Lumpur Coordinates 3.105217, 101.729432", "centrePolicy": "1.	If you do not attend on the booked date, the fees paid will be forfeited, and no refund will be issued.

2.	A minimum of 48 hours' notice is required to change a booking. Any changes are subject to court availability.

3.	For open courts, bookings affected by weather conditions may be rescheduled, subject to court availability. To reschedule, please WhatsApp us at +603-78904143 before your booking starts. If your booking is already in progress, it cannot be rescheduled, but the remaining time may be extended.

4.	Each court booking is eligible for a one-time reschedule only.

5.	Do not leave personal belongings unattended. We are not responsible for any lost or stolen items.

6.	Participants must behave responsibly while using the facilities. Please treat all equipment and facilities with care, maintain cleanliness, and refrain from littering, smoking, consuming alcohol, or bringing food. Water bottles and trash should be disposed of in designated trash bins after use.

7.	For students below the age of 16, the use of courts must be accompanied by an adult.

8.      Please refrain from recording videos (e.g., TikTok or other social media content such as dancing, singing, etc.) with the school campus as a background.

9.	The school reserves the right to allocate facilities for school activities and tournaments, as well as to revise fees, rules, and regulations as needed. For fees, please refer to the venue pricing. You will be notified in advance if your court booking needs to be rescheduled.

10.	The school is not liable for any injuries, accidents, or damages that may occur while using the facilities. Participation is at your own risk. By booking and using the facilities, you acknowledge and accept this risk. The school will not be held responsible for any claims arising from the use of its facilities.

11.    If any facilities are found damaged due to misuse, you will be required to cover the repair costs. Additionally, if any users are found using the courts without complying with the terms and conditions, the school reserves the right to immediately revoke access and prohibit future use of the facilities.



🏀 在泰莱国际学校（吉隆坡）球场打球, 放松和享受！ 🎾
正在寻找进行您最喜欢的运动的场所吗？我们的 宽敞、维护良好的球场 位于市中心，可通过任何交通方式轻松抵达。
🌿 为什么选择我们的场所？
 ✅ 位置便利 – 从城市的任何地方均可轻松到达。
 ✅ 免费停车 – 通过我们预订球场，即可享受无忧停车。
 ✅ 气氛很好 – 在干净、维护良好的空间中玩耍，并在宁静的庭院中放松身心。
 ✅ 刷新和充电 – 从我们的自动售货机买一杯饮料，并在比赛间隙安静地散步。
快来体验一下 美妙的运动环境 你可以在哪里 打球、放松、享受 每一刻！
📅 立即预订您的球场，在 TISKL 球场上与您见面
 
条款和条件
1.        	如果您未在预订日期参加，所支付的费用将被没收，且不予退款。
 
2.        	更改预订需至少提前 48 小时发出通知。任何变更均视法庭情况而定。
 
3.        	对于开放球场，受天气条件影响的预订可能会重新安排，具体取决于球场的可用性。如需重新安排，请在预订开始前通过 WhatsApp +603-78904143 联系我们。如果您的预订已在进行中，则无法重新安排，但剩余时间可能会延长。
 
4.        	每次法庭预订只能一次性重新安排。
 
5.        	请勿将个人物品留在无人看管的地方。我们对任何丢失或被盗的物品不承担任何责任。
 
6.        	参与者在使用设施时必须负责任。请爱护所有设备设施，保持清洁，不乱扔垃圾、吸烟、饮酒、携带食物。使用后的水瓶和垃圾应扔进指定垃圾桶。
 
7.        	对于 16 岁以下的学生，使用球场必须有成人陪同。
 
8.        	学校保留为学校活动和锦标赛分配设施的权利，以及根据需要修改费用、规则和条例的权利。费用请参阅场地定价。如果您的法庭预订需要重新安排，您将提前收到通知。

9.              请避免以学校校园为背景录制视频（例如 TikTok 或其他社交媒体内容，如跳舞、唱歌等）。
 
10.        	学校对使用设施时可能发生的任何伤害、事故或损坏不承担责任。参与的风险由您自行承担。通过预订和使用设施，您承认并接受此风险。学校对因使用其设施而引起的任何索赔不承担任何责任。
 
11.     	如果我们发现您损坏了设施，我们将要求您赔偿维修费用。此外，如果发现任何用户在不遵守条款和条件的情况下使用球场，学校保留立即和将来阻止您使用该设施的权利。", "announcement": "🚧 Campus Transformation -  Temporary Car Park in Use Starting 1 Nov 2025 🚗

Dear Sports Courts Patrons,

Further to our previous communication regarding the school transformation project, which has been delayed, please be informed that starting Saturday, 1 November 2025 (previously scheduled for 7 July 2025), the existing car park at Taylor’s International School Kuala Lumpur will be closed for approximately one year as we begin the transformation of our campus.

During this period, parking will be redirected to a temporary car park located on the school field, clearly marked in yellow on the location map (see venue photo for reference).

Why the change?
We are embarking on an exciting redevelopment project to construct a covered car park and a brand-new sports complex — part of our continued commitment to enhance the facilities for our students, families, and community.

We truly appreciate your patience and support as we work to improve your experience at TISKL.

Best regards,
Taylor’s International School Kuala Lumpur

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🏀 Play, Relax, and Enjoy at Taylor’s International School (KL) Courts! 🎾
Looking for the perfect place to play your favorite sport? Our spacious, well-maintained courts are located in the heart of the city, making them easily accessible by any mode of transport.
🌿 Why Choose Our Courts?
✅ Convenient Location – Easily reachable from anywhere in the city.
✅ Free Parking – Enjoy hassle-free parking when you book a court with us.
✅ Great Atmosphere – Play in a clean, well-maintained space with a serene courtyard for relaxation.
✅ Refresh & Recharge – Grab a drink from our vending machines and take a peaceful stroll between games.
✅ Safe -  With on-site security, you can wait for your ride with total peace of mind after the game. 🚗
Come and experience a fantastic sporting environment where you can play, unwind, and enjoy every moment!
📅 Book your court today and See you on TISKL's courts

Option 1: We will be on the 1st floor, above McDonald's. Take the stairs up one floor, turn left, and you'll see us.

Option 2: Take the lift opposite the Chicken Rice Shop, go up to the 1st floor, and turn right. Walk a bit, and you’ll see us there. ", "centrePolicy": "Booking Refunds & Changes 
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of the non-utilized sessions. 
2. 24 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change the booking time is subject to court availability and can only be made once.

Others 
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.

"Booking Refunds & Changes
1. Strictly no refund or carry forward of non-utilised sessions.
2. Pool facility that impacted by rain can be rescheduled, and is subject to time availability. Whatsapp to our Customer Service Hotline 018-3450316 for rescheduling purpose.
3. 48 hours advance notice must be given for any change of booking time. Any request to change booking time is subject to availability.
4.  Please make booking based on the valid ID (MyKad / JKM Card) and check-in is required to present valid ID at the booking counter in order to obtain wristlet for entry. If no valid ID is presented or found any mismatch in booking, customers will need to pay up the balance amount per Normal Rate, else Management reserve the rights to deny entry and booking is non-refundable.
5. All court booking is eligible for a reschedule only three times.

MKN & KBS SOP
Kindly note that the Centre reserves the rights to deny entry or to end your session and remove you from our venue if you do not adhere to the SOP.
1. Only individuals with 'Low Risk' MySejahtera status are allowed to enter the premise or participate in the activity
2. Wear your face mask at all times. You may only remove your face mask during swimming/game.
3. If doing any of the following activities, it is considered as freediving:
a) Breath holding activities
b) Using Freediving long fins
c) Using Monofins
**All freedivers must be accompanied by a partner/ buddy prior to entering the pool.
4. Proper swim attire must be worn and only allowed to enter pool.  Non swim wear such as cotton/jeans/jersey and etc are not allowed to enter pool.
5. Unruly, disruptive or offensive behaviour and profanity is strictly prohibited and will not be tolerated. 
6. Wash and sanitise your hands frequently.
7. Players are encouraged to maintain physical distancing (at least 1m where possible) where face masks are not worn.
8. Leave immediately after your session.
9. Freelance coaches should register in the counter and pay the commercial fee to the landlord before proceeding with the lesson.
10. Family coaching another family member should register and inform the counter that they are not coaching with remuneration. Maximum of 3 students are allowed.

Others
1. Please do not leave your valuables unattended. We will not be responsible for any theft.

1. Strictly no refund, no rescheduling, and no carry forward of the non-utilized sessions.

General Rules
1. Smoking, chewing gum, and spitting are prohibited both inside and outside the field.
2. Respect others and avoid conflicts. Any violence leading to injuries will result in reporting to authorities.
3. Keep the area clean by disposing of trash in designated bins.
4. Users are responsible for damages to the court, net, or facilities during their booking.
5. Do not leave valuables unattended; the arena is not liable for theft or damage to personal belongings.
6. Prioritize safety to prevent injuries; the arena is not liable for any injuries sustained during bookings.
7. Non-compliance with rules and SOPs may lead to the removal of players at the discretion of 149 Sports Arena.

Additional Terms & Conditions:

COVID-19 Guidelines
1. All users must adhere to the arena's COVID-19 safety guidelines, including mask-wearing and social distancing where applicable.

Footwear Requirements
1. Proper non-marking sports shoes must be worn on the court at all times to prevent damage.

Booking Extension
1. Booking extensions can be requested subject to availability and an additional fee.

Guest Policy
1. Guests must be registered at the time of booking and are subject to the same terms and conditions.

Age Restrictions
1. Users under age 14 must be accompanied by a guardian or have explicit parental consent.

Behavioral Standards
1. Profanity, offensive language, and unsportsmanlike conduct are not tolerated and may result in removal from the premises.

Equipment Responsibility
1. Users are responsible for their sports equipment and must ensure it does not cause damage to the court or facilities.

Photography and Media Release
1. By entering the premises, users grant the arena the right to use any photographs or videos taken for promotional purposes.

Force Majeure
1. The arena is not liable for disruptions or cancellations due to unforeseen circumstances beyond its control.

Terms Modifications
1. The arena reserves the right to modify or update these terms and conditions as needed.

Payment Policy
1. All bookings must be paid for in advance. Failure to make payment may result in cancellation of the booking.", "announcement": "Modular Volleyball Court is now officially launched!
